recommendations.title: The Mauritanian
recommendations.overview: The true story of the Mauritanian Mohamedou Ould Slahi, who was held at the U.S military's Guantanamo Bay detention center without charges for over a decade and sought help from a defense attorney for his release.

recommendations.title: How I Live Now
recommendations.overview: An American girl, sent to the English countryside to stay with relatives, finds love and purpose while fighting for her survival as war envelops the world around her.

recommendations.title: Touching the Void
recommendations.overview: The true story of Joe Simpson and Simon Yates' disastrous and nearly-fatal mountain climb of 6,344m Siula Grande in the Cordillera Huayhuash in the Peruvian Andes in 1985.

recommendations.title: Life in a Day
recommendations.overview: A documentary shot by filmmakers all over the world that serves as a time capsule to show future generations what it was like to be alive on the 24th of July, 2010.
recommendations.director: Jon Haas, Kevin Macdonald, Phil Loarie, Zillah Bowes, Kjell Bismeyer

recommendations.title: The Last King of Scotland

recommendations.title: Whitney
recommendations.overview: Examines the life and career of singer Whitney Houston. Features never-before-seen archival footage, exclusive recordings, rare performances and interviews with the people who knew her best.

recommendations.title: Black Sea
